title: Chavismo: la peste del siglo XXI
original_title: Chavismo: La peste del siglo XXI
overview: An analysis of the causes, social, political, and economic that caused the rise of Hugo Chávez as president of Venezuela; his abuse of power and the response of civil society, including the student movement; his political fall as well as the secrecy that surrounded his illness and the succession of Nicolás Maduro.
